title: verbascum elegantulum
intro: Verbascum elegantulum, also known as the Elegant Mullein, is a flowering plant species in the mullein genus. This biennial plant is native to Europe and is known for its large, woolly leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Verbascum elegantulum include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, have been used to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
